scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install && pnpm infra:up && pnpm wait:pg && pnpm db:push:force && pnpm db:seed
scripts.wait:pg: node -e "const c=require('child_process');const t=Date.now();while(Date.now()-t<60000){try{c.execSync('docker exec siteflow-pg pg_isready -U siteflow -d siteflow',{stdio:'ignore'});console.log('postgres ready');process.exit(0)}catch{c.execSync('sleep 1')}}console.error('timeout waiting for postgres');process.exit(1)"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web,field -c yellow,cyan,green "pnpm --filter @siteflow/api dev" "pnpm --filter @siteflow/web dev" "pnpm --filter @siteflow/field dev"
